nasb.text: “For this commandment which I command you today is not too difficult for you, nor is it out of reach.

esv.text: “For this commandment that I command you today is not too hard for you, neither is it far off.

cnv.text: “其實我今日吩咐你的這誡命，對你並不太難，離你也不太遠。

ccb.text: “我今天颁布给你们的诫命，对你们来说不难遵行，也非遥不可及。
